violations.text: Ice was observed built up in excess on the walk in cooler refrigeration unit blower fans. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment to have walk in cooler serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026
The grout on the tile floors throughout the kitchen was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the one door low boy below the hot hold. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
Water was observed pooling on the floor in the basement. Establishment is to have basement assessed for leaks to eliminate pooling water. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2025

The grout throughout the kitchen area including walk in cooler was observed in poor repair. Establishment is to fix areas of low grout. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2025

The door to the outside, located in the receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
Refrigerator door gasket of the lowboy unit observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The outer wall (bottom) of the walk-in cooler area is in poor repair. There are sections missing, leaving open spaces that are unable to be cleaned. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
